description: Pricing and uses of the most common derivatives including options, forward contracts, futures contracts, and swaps.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: FINANCE/​ECON  300, (MATH 213or222), and (GEN BUS 307,317,656,ACT SCI 654,655,ECON 400,410,STAT/​MATH  310,STAT 312,333or concurrent enrollment), or declared in undergraduate Business Exchange program
